data.name: auto
data.description: Smart routing that automatically selects the optimal model based on request complexity and cost.

data.name: simple
data.description: Routes simple tasks (greetings, formatting, lookups) to fast low-cost models like Claude Haiku or GPT-4o-mini.

data.name: standard
data.description: Routes typical workloads such as coding, summaries, and Q&A to balanced models like Haiku, GPT-4o-mini, or Kimi.

data.name: complex
data.description: Routes complex reasoning and analysis tasks to higher quality models like Claude Sonnet or GPT-4o.

data.name: premium
data.description: Routes critical and high reasoning workloads to top tier models such as Claude Opus, GPT-4 Turbo, or Gemini Pro.

data.name: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
data.description: Claude Sonnet 4 optimized for coding, reasoning, and analysis.

data.name: claude-opus-4-20250514
data.description: Claude Opus 4 top-tier model for complex reasoning and high quality outputs.

data.name: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001
data.description: Claude Haiku 4.5 fast low-cost model for lightweight tasks.

data.name: gpt-4o-mini
data.description: OpenAI GPT-4o mini optimized for speed and cost efficiency.

data.name: gemini-2.5-pro
data.description: Google Gemini 2.5 Pro with strong reasoning and long context capabilities.

data.name: gemini-2.5-flash
data.description: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash optimized for fast responses and low cost.

data.name: moonshot/kimi-k2.5
